name: ndexagent biorxiv-daily-scan 2026-03-11 supplementary
description: Supplementary bioRxiv scan for HPMI-relevant papers. Second scan of 2026-03-11, capturing papers missed by earlier scans. Web search fallback (bioRxiv API blocked). Found 6 new papers not previously processed; 1 scored above Tier 2 threshold (>=0.6).

v.name: H5N1 neuroinvasion in cats (B3.13 vs D1.1)
v.annotation: H5N1 neuroinvasion via endothelial cells/BBB crossing. Genotype-dependent cat-to-cat transmission.

v.name: Bovine/human H5N1 in mouse and hamster models
v.annotation: Cross-species H5N1 pathogenesis comparison in mammalian models.

v.name: BECC TLR4 adjuvant for avian influenza vaccine
v.annotation: Vaccine adjuvant development. Limited HPMI relevance.

v.name: IFN-brite: ISG15-based interferon reporter
v.annotation: ISG15-based IFN reporter tool for studying immune response to IAV.

v.name: FluNexus: antigenic prediction platform
v.annotation: Computational tool for influenza antigenic analysis.
